title: agathis australis
intro: Agathis australis, also known as the Kauri tree, is a species of coniferous tree native to New Zealand. The Kauri tree has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, with its resin and extracts possessing antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Agathis australis have been found to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections, making it beneficial for skin conditions and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Agathis australis typically include tinctures, ointments, and salves, which can be applied topically to reap its health benefits, including soothing skin irritations and promoting tissue repair.
